title: Retry Operations with Exponential Backoff and Jitter in Go
summary: Retry one operation in Go with exponential backoff, jitter, and retryable error filtering.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers first-attempt success, retry before success, non-retryable failures, retry exhaustion, context cancellation during backoff, invalid input handling, and large-attempt delay clamping.
